html.description: Bundled template path in the container (local/dev). Mutually exclusive with htmlS3Key.

htmlS3Bucket.description: S3 bucket for the HTML template input. Required with htmlS3Key.

htmlS3Key.description: S3 key for the HTML template input.

outputS3Bucket.description: S3 bucket for the rendered output. Falls back to RENDER_BUCKET env if omitted.

outputS3Key.description: S3 key for the rendered file. If omitted but outputS3Bucket is set, auto-generates under renders/.

format.description: Output format (default: webm). Also inferred from outputFileName or outputS3Key extension.

outputFileName.description: Local filename before upload (default: overlay-transparent.<ext> for chosen format).

templateWidth.description: Template design width to scale from (default: 1920).

templateHeight.description: Template design height to scale from (default: 1080).

video.description: Alternative grouping for width, height, templateWidth, templateHeight, fps.
